front.title: Agent Identity Protocol (AIP): Decentralized Identity and Delegation for AI Agents

abstract.t: The Agent Identity Protocol (AIP) defines a decentralized identity, delegation, and authorization framework for autonomous AI agents. AIP combines W3C Decentralized Identifiers (DIDs), capability-based authorization, cryptographic delegation chains, and deterministic validation to enable secure, auditable multi-agent workflows without relying on centralized identity providers.
